title: ウイニングチケット登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, Winning Ticket will be taking on
the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Back when I first watched the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text: "The Derby is a race filled with dreams!"

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's what the lady sitting next to me told me!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And she was right—I could feel the passion in the
air! Everyone's eyes were sparkling with all the
tension and excitement!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But the thing I remember most is... what
happened when the race finished!

text_block_list.name: Spectator
text_block_list.text: Amazing! She finally did it! Her dream came true!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
The crowd went wild! It was like the air was
booming with all the cheers!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
There were shouts of excitement and joy... But
the lady next to me started crying.

text_block_list.name: Young Ticket
text_block_list.text: What's wrong?! Do you have a stomachache?

text_block_list.name: Woman
text_block_list.text: No, it's just... I'm so happy she won.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's when I knew.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I wanna move people like that too! I wanna
inspire people to dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's why... I wanna enter the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: So I applied and joined the Academy. But...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniff... sob... Just thinking about it... makes me so emotional! Waaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the first day of practice, Winning Ticket is full
of vigor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While cooling down with her friends, she tells the
others about her inspiration.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, can it already. We've heard that story a
million times.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's Narita Taishin, a cool, stoic classmate of
Winning Ticket's.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, we'll be able to recite it word for
word soon enough.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And this is Biwa Hayahide, a classmate with a love
for logic and reason.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if Winning Ticket heard her friends'
dismissive words, but she wipes her tears and
goes on...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's not long now before I'll be officially joining
the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm one step closer to becoming a Derby
Champion!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Thanks a bunch for picking me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Uh, didn't you pick your trainer yourself?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I bet there's gonna be tons of ups and downs and
derbies on the road ahead!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: "And derbies"?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But all the same, I'm counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Winning Ticket shakes my hand
with such enthusiasm that I feel like it might come
out of its socket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Let's go for the Derby together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is what convinced me to become Winning
Ticket's trainer—her genuine passion for the
Japanese Derby.
choice_data_list: I'm excited to work with you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All riiight! Let's DO THIIIS!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, is all the yelling necessary?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. Let her have at it today. She's been
looking forward to this for a long time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite their wry comments, the two of them look
at Winning Ticket with caring looks on their faces.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After training, I take the runners to a
newly-opened taiyaki shop.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Look at all these new stores. Takoyaki, crepes,
steamed buns...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And they'll all taste three times as yummy with
friends!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So this is Winning Ticket's everyday life... It's
comforting to see her so joyful.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh! Right? That's 'cause we've been rivals
since we joined the academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Back at the start of the school year, when
everyone was recording their first run times...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay! 2,400 meters! I'm gonna make it all the
way!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, usually new students try for 1,000 meters...
I could never do 2,400.

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: Right? And on top of that...

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: There's three of them.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Guess that's Tracen Academy for you!

text_block_list.name: Instructor
text_block_list.text: On your marks, get set... GO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At the signal, the three racers take off all at once.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(That's Biwa Hayahide in front of me. And the
footsteps behind me are... I think her name's
Narita Taishin?)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(Okay, I'm gonna overtake Biwa Hayahide at the
final stretch! It'll push my stamina right to the
limit...)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(But the others'll be at their limit too! I'll wow
them with an amazing final dash! Heheh!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, Winning Ticket approaches the final
stretch.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... This... is it—huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if she knew all along that Winning Ticket
would sprint forward at that moment, Biwa
Hayahide suddenly increases her own speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket can't gain an inch on the skilled
racer in front of her.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: NOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And while she's agitated, the petite shadow of
Narita Taishin suddenly streaks past from behind!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Haaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Achieving the very feat that Winning Ticket
couldn't, Narita Taishin pulls off a final sprint
powerful enough to pull up besides Biwa
Hayahide...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
(I don't wanna lose! I really, really don't wanna
lose!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leaving Winning Ticket in their dust, the other
two dash furiously across the finish line almost
simultaneously!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Wow... You guys are AMAZING!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide! We've never raced together, have
we?! It's like you knew exactly when I was gonna
speed up!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Well, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: And you, Narita Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That was an awesome sprint at the end! I thought I was a good sprinter, but I couldn't keep up at all!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
WAAAH! I'm so fired up! To think I've got such
amazing classmates!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm Winning Ticket! My goal's to race in the
Derby! Guess we're rivals from here on, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What a weirdo...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Weird?! Who, me?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Pfft... Haha! Thank you, Winning Ticket. I'm
honored to receive your admiration.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was impressed myself by your determination.
Your vigor during the race was unparalleled.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Unpara... parachute?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Never mind... I'm Biwa Hayahide. It's a pleasure to
meet you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heh heh! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And then, I'm not sure exactly how or when, but I
started getting along with Taishin too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, too, was quite taken by your passion
during scrimmages and practice races. Didn't you
notice?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: What?! Really? Why didn't you say so, Taishin?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shut up, dummy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Why'd she get mad at me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though dusk is falling on our little corner of the
shopping street, their cheerful chatter shows no
sign of ending.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus begins my journey to make Winning Ticket a
Derby Champion!
